message:
Apply Clippy lints across demo_showcase crate

Systematic cleanup addressing multiple Clippy warnings:

app.rs:
- Use map_or instead of map().unwrap_or() for timestamp
- Allow option_if_let_else for complex conditional
- Fix doc comment backtick escaping

command_palette.rs:
- Add #[must_use] to pure getter functions
- Make to_app_msg() const

dashboard.rs:
- Collapse redundant match arms using | patterns
- Make simple state mutation methods const
- Use let chains for cleaner conditional guards
- Copy bounds from RwLock before testing to minimize lock duration

files.rs, wizard.rs:
- Use let chains instead of nested if-let
- Collapse identical match arms

theme.rs:
- Various minor Clippy-suggested improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
